task_completion.description: Open the asbestos report and log into the OpenMaint web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor displaying the 'asbestos_report_2026.txt' file and a web browser logged into the OpenMaint dashboard at localhost:8090.

task_completion.description: Update the status of existing asset HAZ-001 to reflect its abatement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint asset detail view or edit form for 'HAZ-001' (Vinyl Floor Tiles) showing its status changed to a retired, abated, or inactive state.

task_completion.description: Create a new asset record for HAZ-002 linked to the Boiler Room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint asset creation form or saved record showing a new asset with ID 'HAZ-002' and its location/room field explicitly set to 'Boiler Room'.

task_completion.description: Create a new asset record for HAZ-003 linked to Roof Access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint asset creation form or saved record showing a new asset with ID 'HAZ-003' and its location/room field explicitly set to 'Roof Access'.

task_completion.description: Append the required warning text to the Boiler Room's notes or description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint room detail or edit view for 'Boiler Room' showing the text 'WARNING: HAZMAT PRESENT - 2026 SURVEY' added to the notes or description field.

task_completion.description: Append the required warning text to the Roof Access room's notes or description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint room detail or edit view for 'Roof Access' showing the text 'WARNING: HAZMAT PRESENT - 2026 SURVEY' added to the notes or description field.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to perform the updates rather than backend scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenMaint web interface, filling out forms, and saving records in the browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not create an asset record for the negative finding in Office 102.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the creation of an asset record for Office 102 or 'Drywall Joint Compound'.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the required warning text into the correct fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the warning text being typed or pasted into the actual OpenMaint text fields for room descriptions/notes, not just a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating OpenMaint based on an asbestos report. 1. Asset HAZ-001 (Lobby) must be marked as abated/retired. 2. New assets HAZ-002 (Boiler Room) and HAZ-003 (Roof Access) must be created. 3. The exact text 'WARNING: HAZMAT PRESENT - 2026 SURVEY' must be added to the notes/description of the Boiler Room and Roof Access records. 4. No asset should be created for Office 102, as it was a negative finding.
